text: 2026-07-24: local machine's tools/baseline.csv (git-ignored, machine-local) is stale relative to the current harness schema — its dispatch_path values are "cold" and rhs_width/density use legacy encodings, so test-benchmark-harness.R:151 ("tools/baseline.csv joins against every synthetic CPU result") fails locally (CI unaffected: no local baseline file there, test skips). The test is doing its job; do not relax it. Resolution: regenerate the local baseline with Rscript tools/benchmark-regression.R --update (per .gitignore note) as part of the baseline refresh work in this epic. Until then the full local suite reads 673/674 green with this one known stale-artifact failure.
